page_content:
HESP799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

HESP808 Current Research in Hearing, Speech and Language Services (1-3 Credits)

Current research in speech, language and hearing sciences and disorders.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral); Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master’s)) ; and permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
